title: Coins Experience
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5c76dad2b6a65f248a26b33f4185897f2d77729.png)
# About
Have you ever had a desire for something more material than experience?
Resource Pack replaces default xp orbs with coins, so you can get richer with every killed enemy

# Features
- XP orbs textures.
- XP pickup and levelup sounds.
- Experience Bottle texture.
- Custom XP bar with custom text color.
- Renamed items and gui elements (_in anvil, enchanting table_)
![TitleBar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/579065fcc36e869f38cc3499a94388083b0d4c6f.png)

  ![Showcase Gif](https://i.imgur.com/zmD6d4a.gif)

## Note:
Choose right version. Сorrect functioning of the resource pack depends on this
